checked_dimensions.name: spec_compliance
checked_dimensions.evidence: Issue 091 only updates stale AGENTS.md stage guidance and repository memory to match the implemented SpecBridge phase.

checked_dimensions.name: acceptance_criteria
checked_dimensions.evidence: AGENTS.md no longer claims foundation-only status, states governed standardization and runtime expansion, and still requires active contracts, scopes, validations, security/review/CI gates, final reports, audit packets, and ChatGPT/Codex audits.

checked_dimensions.name: policy_boundaries
checked_dimensions.evidence: The task changed only AGENTS.md and declared repository evidence files under the issue 091 scope. Product code, scripts, workflows, dependencies, production, auth, billing, database, and deployment surfaces were untouched.

checked_dimensions.name: security_rules
checked_dimensions.evidence: AGENTS.md still blocks secrets, production, billing, auth security, authorization security, destructive database changes, CI/CD security changes, dependency installation, deployment automation, and production deployment unless explicitly authorized by policy and contract.

checked_dimensions.name: test_evidence
checked_dimensions.evidence: Required local validators for contracts, scopes, final reports, audit packets, ChatGPT audits, security gate, review gate, and diff whitespace are recorded in the audit packet.

checked_dimensions.name: ci_evidence
checked_dimensions.evidence: GitHub CI for issue 091 is not collected yet and remains an external merge gate. The audit packet marks it not_collected rather than passed.

checked_dimensions.name: final_report_honesty
checked_dimensions.evidence: The final report records local completion, GitHub CI as not_collected, pending pull request and merge gates, no deployment, and no product-code risk.

findings.evidence: Issue 091 local evidence is ready, but GitHub CI cannot be recorded as passed until the branch is pushed and checks run.
findings.recommendation: Push the branch, open a pull request, wait for GitHub checks, and merge only if required gates pass.

unresolved_risks: GitHub PR CI evidence is pending.
